net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.agent

Class Agent

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.observer.Subject
      • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.agent.Agent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Runnable

    public class Agent
extends Subject
implements java.lang.Runnable
    This class is the agent object. It walks a specific calculated path and reacts to obstacles occurring on the go.
    Author:
    marc.engelmann

      void redefinePathLayout()
      When there is a new path found, this method cuts the old path up to the current point so that there is no overlapping with the new path but instead a matching complete path.

             Agent.AgentMode mode,

        This method constructs an agent.
        Parameters:
        passenger - the passenger which is represented by the agent
        start - the starting vector
        goal - the goal vector

      • passengerStowsLuggage

        public boolean passengerStowsLuggage()
        This method returns if the passenger is ready to stow his luggage
        Returns:
        if the passenger is ready to stow luggage

      • redefinePathLayout

        public void redefinePathLayout()
        When there is a new path found, this method cuts the old path up to the current point so that there is no overlapping with the new path but instead a matching complete path.

      • findNewPath

        public void findNewPath()
                 throws java.lang.NullPointerException
        This method finds a new path. The finalCostmap is needed so that there is no overlapping of different agent positions over time. The cost map is always modified based on the non-editable final cost map calculated at the beginning.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException

      • getPosition

        public Vector getPosition()
        This method returns the current position of the agent
        Returns:
        the current position
